message:
test(connectors): Expand unit test coverage for all connectors

Comprehensive test coverage expansion across five connector modules,
adding 2400+ lines of new tests to verify edge cases, error handling,
and data normalization behavior.

Connector Test Expansions:

tests/connector_amp.rs (+34 lines):
- Author field extraction verification (author vs sender vs model)
- External ID extraction priority (file stem vs JSON id)
- Minor test refinements for edge cases

tests/connector_claude.rs (+530 lines):
- Agent slug verification
- Source path and external ID extraction
- Workspace inference from cwd/project fields
- Timestamp extraction (started_at, ended_at)
- Message index sequentiality
- Author/model field mapping
- Empty conversation handling
- JSON structure variations
- Nested directory scanning
- Metadata preservation

tests/connector_cline.rs (+539 lines):
- SQLite task database parsing
- Task ID grouping into conversations
- Column fallback chains (content vs text vs body)
- Timestamp parsing (ISO-8601 and Unix)
- Author extraction from multiple fields
- NULL content filtering
- Multiple task handling
- Empty database scenarios
- Workspace from cwd field
- Message ordering by timestamp

tests/connector_codex.rs (+379 lines):
- JSONL session file parsing
- Session ID extraction from filenames
- Workspace inference
- Message role normalization
- Incremental indexing (since_ts)
- Empty/malformed file handling
- Special characters and Unicode
- Long content handling
- Directory structure scanning

tests/connector_opencode.rs (+981 lines):
- SQLite session database parsing
- Session grouping and ID extraction
- Column fallback handling
- Timestamp extraction and ordering
- Author field extraction
- NULL and empty content filtering
- Multiple sessions per database
- Nested directory scanning
- Metadata JSON preservation
- Error handling for missing files

Test patterns used consistently:
- TempDir-based isolation for file system tests
- Helper functions for fixture creation
- Sequential index verification
- Timestamp range validation
- Role/author field mapping verification
- Empty content filtering behavior

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
